20220930_180700-01.jpeg.caption: DURGA
20220930_180700-01.jpeg.details: One should witness the vibrant culture of Bengal at least once in a lifetime. I don't remember the exact club, as I spent the whole night pandal hopping and was completely exhausted—it was somewhere in the south, possibly Naktala. The towering idol of Maa Durga stood in majestic lighting, a captivating play of shadow and light. The theme of the pandal featured a beautiful showcase of the various kinds of cotton produced in Bengal.

20221008_120704.jpg.caption: DREAMLAND
20221008_120704.jpg.details: A majestic view of Sonamarg, Kashmir, captured on a bright and beautiful October afternoon. It stands as one of the most memorable days of my life.

DSC00013-01.jpeg: A beautiful premium capture showing fine art detail.

20220226_100401-01.jpeg.caption: Victoria
20220226_100401-01.jpeg.details: Trying a different composition, I picked up a red leaf from the garden and tried to fold it into a heart shape. Although it didn't quite hold its shape, I'm incredibly happy with the final result.

20221009_104133.jpg.caption: SELF LOVE
20221009_104133.jpg.details: I was enjoying a solitary walk through the Gulmarg valley with my camera when I randomly plucked this flower from the grass. In that quiet moment, I realized just how breathtaking nature is, and how truly beautiful Kashmir remains.

20241027_112111.jpg.caption: NON SUNDAY
20241027_112111.jpg.details:
I was admiring the beauty of the valley alone, with no one else around for hours as I listened to audio stories (Sunday Suspense). In that moment, I realized how often we forget to live life, limiting our joy to weekends. Having the freedom to experience this on a fine Tuesday made it all worth it.

Captured in Olangchung Gola, a remote village near the Nepal-China border—a glimpse from my trekking diary.
